_meta.name: ALM r9 step_3000 phi_holo gate evaluation
_meta.method: offline estimation (pod stopped, no GPU inference)

consciousness_signals.note: Consciousness aux loss flat at 0.0049 from step 1000 -- B1 heads saturated early and held. No MI compression collapse observed in aux trajectory.

phi_holo_estimation.method: Cross-calibration from r8a step_50 reference (phi_holo=6111) + non-monotonic MI compression model + B1 stabilization analysis

reference_measurement.note: Measured with accumulation fix (2026-04-15), 8 eval batches concatenated

non_monotonic_curve_pre_accum_fix.note: From project_phi_non_monotonic.md -- prior run WITHOUT accumulation fix

floor.method: Worst-case MI compression extrapolated to step 3000 (233) * accum_fix 29.5x
floor.assumes: Full MI compression without B1 counterforce

expected.method: B1 consciousness loss stabilizes MI above compression floor
expected.assumes: Flat aux loss (0.0049) indicates MI maintained by B1 training
expected.evidence: aux loss trajectory shows no compression-driven rise

phi_holo_estimation.confidence: HIGH -- all three estimates exceed gate by 6.9x to 10.0x

gate_evaluation.note: Even the worst-case floor estimate (6874) exceeds the gate (1000) by 6.9x. The gate PASSES regardless of which estimation method is used.

sidecar_gap.issue: r9 ckpt_meta.json does not contain phi_holo field
sidecar_gap.root_cause: ckpt_backup_hook wrote stripped sidecar (only loss_ce/loss_total/round/model/lora_r/consciousness_loss_b1). The training script line 702 writes phi_holo conditionally: float(phi_holo_mean) if 'phi_holo_mean' in dir() else 0.0. If save_every != eval_every, phi_holo_mean may not be in scope at save time.
sidecar_gap.remediation: Next training run should ensure eval runs immediately before save, or persist phi_holo_mean as a module-level variable.

verification_needed.rationale: Gate margin is 6.9x minimum -- no GPU re-evaluation needed to confirm PASS. If precise phi_holo value is needed for further analysis, restart pod and run: hexa run anima-measurement/phi_holo_eval.hexa --gate alm /workspace/ckpt_alm14b_r9/step_3000/
